summary: Refine dashboard controls, sidebar theme menu contrast, approval-center layout, approval-flow configuration polish, and organization configuration readability.

notes: No schema changes in this release.
Verified project owner to platform role synchronization on production with scripts/assert-project-role-platform-sync.sql.
Checked production data for active project owners still assigned only employee platform access; no mismatches were found.
Moved the dashboard overview/analysis switch beside the page title and removed duplicate dashboard titles and date pills.
Made dashboard period controls more compact and consistently pill-shaped.
Improved dark-mode visibility for the sidebar settings menu and theme submenu.
Gave approval-center timesheets the primary vertical space and pushed the reserved OT area to a compact page-bottom section.
Polished approval-flow configuration controls with consistent pill buttons, inline validation state, and higher-contrast template selection.
Localized organization configuration select display values and reduced visual confusion from nested gray backgrounds.
Reduced department color saturation for calmer low-noise department chips.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.21 and production VITE variables.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.21.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.21.
known_warnings: Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
Approval-flow template edits affect subsequent submissions; existing running approval graphs keep their historical runtime nodes.
